title: CI checks verification
task: Verify .github/workflows/ci.yml checks job reads TEST_COMMAND from runbook and conditionally executes it. Run bash tests/run-tests.sh locally as CI proxy; confirm no workflow edit needed when runbook updated.
acceptance: CI checks job step runs when TEST_COMMAND non-empty (verify conditional)
Local bash tests/run-tests.sh passes as CI proxy
AC-5 satisfied: CI will report pass/fail from updated TEST_COMMAND
